Skip To Main Content 
# Indian Oil HDFC Bank Credit Card
  * Earn up to 50 Litres of Free fuel annually
  * Earn 5% of your spends as Fuel Points at IndianOil outlets*
  * Earn 5% of your spends as Fuel Points on Groceries and Bill Payments*


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?channelsource=iocl&LGCode=MKTG&mc_id=iocl_cc_prod_pg_hero_banner_applynow&icid=iocl_cc_prod_pg_hero_banner_applynow "Apply Now")
![Indian Oil HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/iocl-desktop-banner-v2-1920x550?fmt=webp-alpha)
What's in store for you
  * [Card Benefits & Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card#a "Card Benefits & Features")
  * [Eligibility Criteria](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card#b "Eligibility Criteria")
  * [Documents Required to Apply](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card#c "Documents Required to Apply")
  * [Application Process](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card#d "Application Process")
  * [Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card#e "Card Management & Controls")
  * [Frequently Asked Questions ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card#f "Frequently Asked Questions ")


## A card for every use
Apply for multiple cards to get   
exclusive discounts and   
offers
![Indianoil HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/indianoil-card-two-fold-banner?fmt=webp)
More benefits than ever before
IndianOil Benefits
  * Earn 5% of your spends as Fuel Points at IndianOil outlets*


Welcome Benefits
  * Complimentary IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM Program (IXRP) membership


Exclusive Benefits
  * Earn Fuel Points on retail spends with the IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card*


Activation Benefits
  * INR 250 worth of voucher upon card activation and completion of at least one transaction within 37 days from card issuance date


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card#a "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### Fuel-Point Benefits
  * Earn 5% Fuel Points on Groceries & Bill Payments (POS & online; max 100 points/month per category*).
  * Earn 1 Fuel Point for every ₹150 spent on other purchases, including UPI transactions. 
  * Applicable on card swipes, Max 250 Fuel Points per month in first 6 months, Max 150 Fuel Points post 6 months from card issuance*


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Indianoil HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Payment Benefits
  * Link your IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card on PayZapp.
  * Earn Additional CashBack along with the card CashPoints on Utility Bills, Mobile Recharges and more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on Shopping in-app over 200plus brands
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Indianoil HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Get up to 50 days of interest free Credit from the date of purchase (subject to submission of the charge by the Merchant).
  * Spend ₹50,000 or above in the first year and get a waiver on the renewal membership fee
  * 1% Fuel Surcharge waiver at all Indian fuel stations (min ₹400/transaction, max ₹250/cycle)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Indianoil HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you’re eligible?
**Salaried**
  * Nationality: Indian
  * Age:Minimum 21 years, Maximum 60 Years
  * Net Monthly Income:> ₹12,000


**Self-Employed**
  * Nationality: Indian
  * Age: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 65 years
  * Annual Income: ITR > ₹6 lakh per annum


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Save up to ₹10,000* annually just like 22 lakh+ HDFC Bank Credit Card Holders 
Apply Now (opens in a new tab)
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driver's licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photos


Address Proof
  * Aadhaar card
  * Passport
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas)
  * Rental agreement
  * Bank statement


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (recent)
  * Form 16
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?channelsource=iocl&LGCode=MKTG&dob=y&mc_id=iocl_cc_prod_pg_3easysteps_applynow&icid=iocl_cc_prod_pg_3easysteps_applynow "Apply Now")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## More about IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Additional Features
  4. ### Contactless Payment
  5. ### Card Reward and Redemption Program
  6. ### Fuel Points Validity & Redemption Limit
  7. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions
  8. ### Value Chart for the Customer
  9. ### Application Channels


###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for managing Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag, and Business Loans. 


  * Spend Tracking  
Simple, intuitive interface to monitor and manage all your business expenses. 


  * Reward Points  
Effortlessly view and redeem reward points with just a click. 


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹500/- plus Applicable Taxes
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of your IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card fees and charges


For card sourced effective 01-11- 2020, Below T&Cs are applicable 
1. The Bank reserves the right to cancel the Card in case the Card remains inactive and is not used for effecting any transaction for a continuous period of 6 (Six) months after prior written notice sent on the email address and/or phone number and/or communication address, registered in the records of the Bank. 
1% Fee on transaction amount will be levied on rental transactions done on any applicable merchant for the month. Fee capped at ₹3,000 per transaction, effective 1st August 2024.
​​​​​​​3.5% Mark-Up fee will be applicable on all International / Cross currency transaction
![Fees & Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Additional Features 
  * **Zero Cost Card Liability:** Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.
  * **Revolving Credit:** Available at a nominal interest rate. (Check Fees and Charges section for more details)
  * **Interest-free Credit Period:** Get up to 50 days of interest free Credit from the date of purchase. (subject to submission of the charge by the Merchant) 
  * **Smart EMI:** Option to convert big spends into EMI after purchase available on IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card. ([Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi) to know more) 


![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * **Contactless Payment:** IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets. 


(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.)
![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Reward and Redemption Program 
  * Fuel Point is an exclusive Rewards metric system created only for IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card holders. Fuel Points can also be earned on retail spends with the IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card.
  * Accelerated 5% Fuel Points on spends at IndianOil outlets, Groceries and Bill payments. (Accelerated 5% Fuel Points benefit will be given only for fuel transactions on IndianOil Retail Outlets.) 
  * Redeem Fuel Points for Free Fuel using the complimentary IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM Program (IXRP) membership. Redemption at participating IndianOil Petrol Outlet by converting Fuel Points into XRP (Xtra Rewards Program where 1 Fuel Point = 3XP = 96 Paise). 
  * Redeem Fuel Points through NetBanking towards catalogue products (where 1 FP = upto 20 paise) 
  * Redeem Fuel Points as CashBack on your IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card. (CashBack Redemption against Statement balance where 1 FP = 20 Paise)

  
| Cost Per Unit in ₹  |   | IOCL Fuel Points in ₹  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Product Catalogue  | CashBack  |   |  
| Upto 0.20  | 0.2  | 1 Fuel Point = 3 ExtraRewards Point (XRP)  
1 XRP = 0.32  
1 Fuel Point = 0.96  |  
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfcbank.com/htdocs/common/HTML_IOCL/LP.html) to know more on the process to redeem Fuel Points, cashback points.
  * To locate your nearest IndianOil Petrol Outlet, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://locator.iocl.com/)


![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fuel Points Validity & Redemption Limit 
Fuel Points are valid for a period of 2 years.
  * Redemption of Reward Points to CashBack and Travel categories will be capped at 50,000 points per month per customer 
  * Accrual of Reward Points on Grocery Spends will be capped at 1000 points per month per customer
  * There will be no Reward Points accrual on Spends made on Rental and Government category payments
  * **Points plus Pay** - A maximum of 70% can be paid using Reward Points and the other 30% to be made by payment modes (Cash/Cards/UPI etc.)


![Fuel Points Validity & Redemption Limit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/co-branded-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.
  * For product specific T&C, [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/indian-oil-hdfc-bank-credit-card/T-and-C-Indian-Oil-Credit-Card.pdf)


![Most Important Terms and Conditions  ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

![Most Important Terms and Conditions  ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?channelsource=iocl&LGCode=MKTG&mc_id=iocl_prod_pg_application_channel_clickhere&icid=iocl_prod_pg_application_channel_clickhere).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/) to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/branch-locator) and our staff will help you with the application.

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What are Fuel Points?
Fuel Points are an exclusive Rewards metric system created only for IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Cardholders. You earn Fuel Points on retail spends you make through your IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Cards and accelerated Fuel Point accrual on key categories like your Fuel spends (Only* at IndianOil Retail outlets), Groceries and Utilities as mentioned in the Product Features and Benefits
*Accelerated 5% Fuel Points benefit will be given only for non-UPI transactions done at IndianOil Retail Outlets. [Click here](http://pubcxpmanager.hbctxdom.com:9085/personal/rupay-cc-on-upi.html "/personal/rupay-cc-on-upi") for fuel points on UPI transactions on IOCL card.
###  What is a Fuel Credit Card?
IndianOil Credit Card is ideal for a frequent driver. This fuel credit card ensures significant savings on fuel purchases, offering practical benefits beyond your vehicle's needs. Apply online today to start maximising your savings on fuel and utility bills without any joining fee.
###  What is IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM PROGRAM that is mentioned in the Product Features?
IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM PROGRAM is an exclusive Loyalty Rewards Program owned and run by Indian Oil Corporation Ltd. This Loyalty program rewards the customers enrolled with them by awarding XTRAREWARDTM Points (XRP) on every transaction at any IndianOil Retail Outlet and also allowing the Customer to redeem these accrued Points at participating IndianOil Retail Outlet for free fuel.
For more details on this program, visit, [https://www.xtrarewards.com](https://cx.indianoil.in/webcenter/portal/Customer/pages_xtrarewards "https://cx.indianoil.in/webcenter/portal/Customer/pages_xtrarewards")
IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Cardholders will get this Membership automatically and for free along with their credit cards. Your Membership will stay valid even after close of this Card or upgrade/migration to another HDFC Bank Credit Card. However, you will no longer be able to convert Fuel Points to XTRAREWARD Points for Fuel Redemption.
###  What is the Eligibility for an Indian Oil Credit Card?
For Salaried Individuals:
  * Nationality: Indian national
  * Age: Min 21 years to Max 60 Years,
  * Net Monthly Income> ₹10,000


For Self-Employed Individuals:
  * Nationality: Indian national
  * Age: Min 21 years and Max 65 Years
  * Annual Income: ITR > ₹6 lakh per annum


###  How do I redeem FP for free fuel?
To redeem Fuel Points for Free Fuel,
  * Convert your accrued Fuel Points into XTRAREWARDTM Points (XRP)
  * Use XRP at participating IndianOil Outlets for free fuel


To locate your nearest IndianOil Petrol Outlet, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://locator.iocl.com/ "https://locator.iocl.com/")
Click here to know more
###  What are the documents required for a Fuel Credit Card application?
To apply for an IndianOil Credit Card, documents such as Identity proof, Address proof, bank statements, etc. may be required. 
Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/faqs) to read more FAQs
###  What is the Annual Fee of IndianOil Credit Card?
The HDFC Bank Indian Oil Credit Card has a Joining Fee of ₹500, along with an annual fee of ₹500. Find the annual fee and joining fees [here.(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/indian-oil-hdfc-bank-credit-card/part-i-key-fact-statement-cum-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf). Some cards may have no joining fees, with waivers based on specific criteria. 
###  I had logged into NetBanking to convert my Fuel Points into XTRAREWARDSTMPOINTS. My Fuel Points got deducted from my Card Account but I still haven’t received my XTRAREWARDSTM POINTS. What do I do?
Please ensure that your latest mobile number is updated on IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM Membership, else your redemption will not get processed successfully.
In case of any questions or help, you can seek assistance through:
Call us on 1800 1600 / 1800 2600 (accessible across India) Customer travelling overseas can reach us on 022-61606160
[Connect with Eva](https://www.hdfcbank.com/personal/need-help/contact-us?query=hi) for quick solutions to common queries
[Contact Nearest Branch](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/)  

Please visit [HDFC Bank Contact Us](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/contact-us) page for more details.
With respect to Fuel Points, if your XTRAREWARDSTM POINTS are not credited to your XTRAREWARDSTM Program Account within 72 hours, then your Fuel Points will be credited back into your Credit Card account within 7-10 business days
XRP can be tracked on https://www.xtrarewards.com or from the POS Terminal at the participating IndianOil Retail Outlet. You can also SMS a query XRP <IOCL XRP Card No> to 9223177998. Alternatively, you can also check your XRP Balance from IndianOil ONE app
###  I already have an existing XTRAREWARDS Program Customer ID. Can I still apply for an IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card?
Yes. You can still apply for an IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card. In this case, instead of creating a new XR CID, your existing XR CID will be merged with this program and you can start converting Fuel Points into XRP and use XRP to redeem free fuel at participating IndianOil Fuel Outlets.
NOTE:
  * Make sure that your Mobile Number registered with the Bank is the same as the mobile number registered with IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM Program
  * In case the registered Mobile Number with the Bank is different from the one registered with IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM Program, or for any questions or help, you can seek assistance through:


Call us on 1800 1600 / 1800 2600 (accessible across India) Customer travelling overseas can reach us on 022-61606160
[Connect with Eva](https://www.hdfcbank.com/personal/need-help/contact-us?query=hi) for quick solutions to common queries
[Contact Nearest Branch](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/)
Please visit [HDFC Bank Contact Us](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/contact-us) page for more details.
###  I bought items from Amazon which along included vegetable oil as well. Why didn’t I get 5% FP on this transaction?
Eligibility for Fuel Points on transaction is basis the Merchant Category Code (MCC) captured for the transaction. Only those MCCs recognized and considered by Partner Networks (Visa/RuPay) for the above mentioned categories will accrue 5% Fuel Points (FP). If your transaction didn’t accrue any FP, it is because it is not recognized as Fuel/Groceries/Utilities/Bill Payment as per standard Merchant Category Code
###  Should I register for XTRAREWARDSTM Program? If so, how to I enroll myself for it?
  * IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Cardholders are automatically and mandatorily registered with IndianOil XTRAREWARDSTM Program during the time of Credit Card issuance.
  * Once the Customer is automatically registered, you will receive an SMS on your registered mobile number from IndianOil, with the confirmation of your XTRAREWARDSTM Program account successfully been created along with an XTRAREWARDSTM Customer ID (XR CID).
  * In case you haven’t received the confirmation SMS within 5 business days of receiving your Credit Card, please connect with the Bank for resolution.


Post creation of your XR CID, you could also install “IndianOil ONE” App from Android Play Store or IOS App store (Not mandatory) to help keep track of your XRP Balance and Transactions
Note: XR CID is created by Indian Oil for the purpose of redeeming points against free fuel. This is different from the Customer ID maintained with the Bank.
###  Can I make partial payments using XTRAREWARD POINTSTM?
Yes, Post verifying that the IndianOil Retail outlet is a  _Participating Outlet,_ check with the Merchant on Payment option using XTRAREWARDTM POINT. Redemption process flow is mentioned in Q2. If you are unable to pay your fuel bill entirely through XTRAREWARDTM POINTS (XRP), Then you can partially pay through XRP and partially through your IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card.
###  What If I wish to cancel my membership with IndianOil XTRAREWARDS Program?
Having Customer ID with XTRAREWARDS Program is necessary since **without this membership, you cannot convert Fuel Points accrued on your credit card into XTRAREWARDTM POINTS and use them at IndianOil Fuel Outlets for free fuel redemption.** Also, having this XR CID is critical to receive information or any status update on your XTRAREWARDSTM Program account with IndianOil.
###  Can I get Fuel Point on all spends?
Fuel Points can be accrued on all kinds of Retail Spends that include both Online and Point of Sale (PoS) transactions. However, there are few kinds of transactions for which you will not get Fuel Points. They are:
  * Fuel transactions at other petrol pumps
  * Any kind of wallet-loading
  * On Returned purchases, disputed or unauthorized/fraudulent transactions
  * EMI Transactions
  * Account Fees and Payment
  * Purchase of jewellery/gold coins or its equivalents


###  I have spent more than Rs. 5000 on Petrol/Diesel/CNG in a calendar month. However, why I received only 150 FP. Why?
Please Note that there is a monthly capping on Fuel Points accrued on the below mentioned spends.
  * Spends at IndianOil Outlets –  
- Monthly Max cap for the first 6 months from card issuance: 250 FP
- Monthly Max cap post 6 months: 150 FP
  * Spends on Groceries – Monthly Max cap: 100 FP
  * Spends on Utilities and Bill Payments – Monthly Max cap: 100 FP


###  What are the benefits of a Fuel Credit Card?
Fuel Credit Cards, like the Indian Oil Credit Card, offer fuel surcharge waivers, reward points on fuel spends, and free fuel accumulation for savings on fuel and utility bills.
###  What is the Cashback of the IndianOil Credit Card? What is the CashBack offered by the IndianOil Credit Card?
Indian Oil Credit Card provides CashBack in the form of reward points, redeemable for free fuel or other options. Details are in the card's terms.
###  How do I check my balance Fuel Points?
Fuel Points accrued on all eligible transactions posted within the calendar month will be added up and credited on the 1st of the next calendar month. Please note that maximum capping will be applied before crediting them.
A. You can check the Fuel Points accrued for the previous calendar month’s transactions posted on the current month statement shared with you (Physical or E-statement)
B. You can also check by Logging into:  
NetBanking -> Cards Tab -> Click on “Enquiry” -> Reward Points Redemption -> Choose your IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card Number -> View total Fuel Points accrued
###  Can I Use the IndianOil Credit Card for Shopping?
Yes, you can use it for shopping, offering benefits not only on fuel but also rewards or cashback on other transactions.
